properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Glory, Glory, Glory to the Lamb, Glory, Glory, Glory to the Lamb, For You are glorious.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And you're worthy to be praised, You're the lamb upon the throne, And unto You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To You we lift our hands in praise You're the lamb upon the throne

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Do we lift our hands in praise You're the lamb upon this throne Glory, oh Glory (Jesus), Glory to the Lamb Glory, Glory, Glory to the Lamb For You are glorious

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Do we lift our hands in praise You're the lamb upon the throne For You are glorious

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Do we lift our hands in praise You're the lamb upon the throne Yes, You're the lamb upon this throne You're the lamb upon this throne Jesus…

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We thank you God, We praise you Lord.
